headline: HUB Cyber Security Acquires Certain Senior Subordinated Convertible Notes And Purchase Rights Of Evofem Biosciences In Exchange Solely For HUB Equity Securities
summary: HUB Cyber Security Ltd. (NASDAQ:HUBC) ("HUB" or the "Company"), today announced that it has acquired certain senior subordinated convertible notes and purchase rights of Evofem Biosciences, Inc.
